phrases.intent_en: Can I pay card at the fish market
phrases.text_local: Kan ik pinnen bij de vishandel?
phrases.cultural_note: Fish markets in the harbour often operate on a cash-only basis.

phrases.intent_en: How do I rent a beach chair
phrases.cultural_note: Beach chair rentals are typically handled by dedicated rental staff in huts along the beach.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the surf school meeting point
phrases.text_local: Waar is het startpunt voor surfles?
phrases.cultural_note: Surf schools often coordinate with equipment renters on the beach.

likely_response.local: Bij de verhuurder op het zand.
likely_response.translation_en: By the renter on the sand.

responses.english: By the renter on the sand.
responses.local: Bij de verhuurder op het zand.

phrases.text_local: Waar is de ingang van de pier?
phrases.cultural_note: Pier entrances are typically marked with clear signs near the boulevard.

likely_response.local: Aan de boulevard, bij de borden.
likely_response.translation_en: On the boulevard, near the signs.

responses.english: On the boulevard, near the signs.
responses.local: Aan de boulevard, bij de borden.
